_note: Supersedes prior artifact (verify_MERCH-INTEL-03_2026-03-10.json). Fingerprint backfill was blocked by 48 archived near-duplicate rows whose computed md5 collided with active row fingerprints. Fixed this session: deleted the 48 archived rows, re-ran backfill.

blocking_issue_resolved.issue: 48 archived (active=false, status='archived') safety/medspa rows had NULL fingerprint. Their computed md5 matched already-indexed fingerprints on the 47 active rows, violating the partial unique index market_signals_fingerprint_idx (WHERE fingerprint IS NOT NULL).
blocking_issue_resolved.root_cause: Migration 20260313000023 archived these rows (SET active=false, status='archived') instead of deleting them. Migration 20260313000027 Step 1 dedup DELETE was scoped to active=true only, so it missed them. Step 5 fingerprint backfill then collided.
deleted_titles: FDA MDR: POWERED LASER SURGICAL INSTRUMENT adverse event (39 rows)
FDA MDR: LASER, OPHTHALMIC adverse event (3 rows)
FDA MDR: OPHTHALMIC FEMTOSECOND LASER adverse event (5 rows)
FDA MDR: OPHTHALMIC EXCIMER LASER SYSTEM adverse event (1 row)
blocking_issue_resolved.note: All deleted rows were surgical/ophthalmic MDR signals — not medspa-relevant. Scoped DELETE: active=false AND status='archived' AND topic='safety' AND vertical='medspa' AND fingerprint IS NULL.

All FEED-MERCH rules that MERCH-INTEL-03 targeted (05, 07, 10, 11, fingerprint) now PASS. Remaining open rules (06, 09, 03) require FEED-WO-01 RSS signal volume — blocked pending NEWSAPI_KEY.
